kits.title: DeFi Dashboard
kits.description: A complete DeFi portfolio tracker showing token balances, USD values, DEX trade history, P&L, and historical portfolio performance across any EVM chain.

kits.title: NFT Portfolio Viewer
kits.description: Browse and value any wallet's NFT collection with floor prices, trait rarity, sale history, transfer tracking, and multi-chain support.

kits.title: AI Wallet Agent
kits.description: An autonomous AI agent that monitors wallets, detects anomalies, verifies counterparties, tracks API credit consumption, and reports onchain activity in real time.

kits.title: Token Analytics
kits.description: Deep token research with holder distribution, leaderboard, price history, whale alerts, risk scoring, and OHLCV charting.

kits.title: Multichain Explorer
kits.description: Track any address across all chains — transactions, balances, NFTs, activity heatmap, and cross-chain activity report in a single view.

kits.title: Solana Builder Kit
kits.description: Everything you need to build Solana apps — wallet balances, SPL tokens, NFTs, DEX trades, staking data, and wallet age activity.

kits.title: Crypto Tax Reporter
kits.description: Generate a complete tax report for any wallet — every buy, sell, and transfer with USD values at time of transaction, realized P&L, and cross-chain coverage.

kits.title: Whale Intelligence
kits.description: Monitor top traders and institutions — track their every move, surface new positions in real time, get instant alerts on large transactions, and copy smart money signals.

kits.title: Token Launch Radar
kits.description: Catch new token launches the second they go live — real-time DEX pair stream, risk scoring, holder distribution, liquidity checks, and Base memecoin screener.

kits.title: Web3 Identity & Reputation
kits.description: Build a wallet profile page serving as an onchain resume — wallet age, multi-chain activity score, credit rating, proof-of-humanity, and Sybil resistance scoring.

kits.title: Wallet Security Audit
kits.description: A full wallet security scanner — find risky token approvals, audit contract interaction history, identify unlimited allowances, flag dangerous spenders, and clean up stale approvals.

kits.title: NFT Market Intelligence
kits.description: Deep NFT market research — collection analytics, floor price trends, trait rarity pricing, sales velocity, top holder analysis, and transfer heatmaps.

kits.title: DAO Governance Toolkit
kits.description: Everything a DAO needs — snapshot eligible voters at a block, show voting power distribution, track delegate activity, monitor upcoming token unlocks, and query supply metadata.

kits.title: Real-Time Alerts & Monitoring
kits.description: Build a zero-polling notification system — webhook delivery on wallet activity, live WebSocket streams for transfers and whale moves, and NFT transfer monitoring.

kits.title: NFT-Gated Platform
kits.description: Ship a token-gated product — exclusive content site, holder dashboard, or Web3 community — where access is controlled by NFT ownership across any chain.

kits.title: Bitcoin Explorer
kits.description: A complete Bitcoin wallet explorer — UTXO balances, full transaction history, HD wallet scanning across all derivation paths, block lookups, and native balance checks.

kits.title: Solana AI Agent Suite
kits.description: A full suite of autonomous AI agents for Solana — portfolio snapshotting, DeFi navigation, risk gating, wallet watching, token launch detection, and transaction validation.

kits.title: Airdrop Farming Toolkit
kits.description: Check eligibility across multiple airdrops simultaneously, score wallets for Sybil resistance, map activity patterns, measure wallet age, and compare wallets side by side.
